overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi horror game. The player character in a spacesuit explores a dimly lit industrial interior with stone walls, metal structures, and prominent red organic growth covering surfaces. The character moves from a large circular vault door through a waiting area with an NPC attendant toward a glass exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with large circular vault door

events.description: character turns away from the circular door and begins walking along the corridor

agents.ego_description: standing before a large circular vault door, then turning right to walk along the corridor

entered.detail: large circular metal door with triangular symbol in the center, set in a stone wall
vertical metal bars forming a gate or barrier
dense red and pink organic tendrils covering the stone wall and ceiling
simple wooden chairs lined against the far wall
exposed metal pipes and conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character facing a massive circular vault door in a narrow industrial corridor. The walls are lined with red organic growth. The character turns right and begins walking along the corridor, passing metal railings on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with heavy organic wall infestation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor past walls covered in red organic tendrils

entered.detail: rough grey stone block wall with industrial piping
horizontal metal pipes mounted on the stone wall
tall wooden reception desk or podium with papers on top
square red cushions scattered on the floor near a rug

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the corridor where dense red organic growth covers the left wall. Metal pipes run along the right stone wall. A wooden podium comes into view on the left as the character approaches a waiting area with chairs and red cushions on the floor.

events.description: NPC attendant becomes visible standing behind the wooden podium

agents.ego_description: walking past the NPC attendant toward the glass exit doorway

notable_agents.action: standing still behind a wooden podium, facing the player character

entered.detail: open doorway with glass panels leading to another room
transparent glass door with metal frame at the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a waiting area where an NPC stands behind a wooden podium on the left. The organic growth is now behind as the character moves toward a glass exit doorway at the end of the corridor. Wooden chairs line the left wall as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial corridor that transitions from a claustrophobic vault area into an open waiting room. It begins facing a massive circular vault door surrounded by red organic growth before the character turns right to walk along a corridor lined with metal railings. As the character advances, the dense organic growth on the left wall gives way to a stone wall with metal pipes on the right, leading toward a wooden podium. The scene then opens into a waiting area featuring chairs with red cushions on the floor and an NPC attendant standing behind the podium. Finally, the camera moves past the wooden chairs lining the wall, leaving the organic growth behind as it pushes toward a glass exit doorway at the end of the hall.
